content.full_text:
June 18, 1990

Alice Hughes
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, Ca 95804

Dear Alice:

As a follow up to our phone conversation today, I would appreciate receiving the information in writing.

A Candidate for a special election in June 1990 did not win a seat on the Council. He is planning to run again in the regular November election.

It is my understanding that a Committee and bank account is established for a specific election (ie. June 1990). Should he run for election in November 1990, it would be necessary to establish a new Committee, however, you are currently allowed to transfer that money to the new account. This is still pending the outcome of a court case, but that is the current information. You would still terminate your current committee.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely Yours,

Dianna M. Higdon, CMC
City Clerk
City of Norco

dh
